2.sql:
SELECT 
  id,
  ssbid1000m,
  ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM statistiskrutenett1km 
WHERE ST_Intersects(
  geom, 
  ST_Transform(
    ST_MakeEnvelope(7.5, 57.5, 8.5, 58.5, 4326),
    25833
  )
)
